# Muhammad Khoerul Habibi - Portfolio

> Web Developer and UI/UX Designer based in Yogyakarta, Indonesia.

Muhammad Khoerul Habibi is a Web Developer specializing in building modern web applications using Vue, Laravel, Tailwind CSS, and GSAP.

## Navigation Links

- [Home](https://mkhabibi.web.id) - Main page and overview.
- [Essence](https://mkhabibi.web.id/#about) - About me, core tech, and services.
- [Showcase](https://mkhabibi.web.id/#showcase) - Portfolio projects showcase.

- [Contact Email](mailto:habiboy0607@gmail.com) - Direct contact mail client link.
